hmong.correct_the_exact_answer_and_estimate_: Yog lawm. Cov lus teb tseeb thiab qhov kwv yees sib haum.

hmong.not_yet_compare_your_answer_with_your_: Tsis tau. Muab koj cov lus teb piv rau koj qhov kwv yees thiab sim ib txoj strategy.
hmong.that_is_not_the_key_error_read_the_wor: Qhov ntawd tsis yog qhov yuam kev tseem ceeb. Nyeem cov hauj lwm ib qho place value zuj zus.
hmong.correct_the_operation_and_context_answ: Yog lawm. Qhov operation thiab cov lus teb raws li ntsiab lus ob qho puav leej haum rau zaj dab neeg.
hmong.reconsider_which_operation_represents_: Rov xav seb qhov operation twg thiaj sawv cev rau qhov kev sib txuas hauv zaj dab neeg.
hmong.the_operation_fits_recheck_how_the_con: Qhov operation haum lawm. Rov xyuas seb ntsiab lus hloov tus lej tshwm sim li cas.
hmong.chosen_for_this_story: raug xaiv rau zaj dab neeg no.
hmong.opening_a_missed_story_for_another_try: Qhib ib zaj dab neeg uas yuam kev los sim dua.

hmong.place_value_table_and_text_alternative: Place value table thiab cov lus hloov chaw
hmong.has_no_dots_because_one_factor_is_zero: tsis muaj dots vim ib tug factor yog xoom; tus product yog xoom.
hmong.one_factor_is_0_so_there_are_no_equal_: Ib tug factor yog 0, yog li tsis muaj pab sib npaug los kos. Product: 0.

hmong.this_whole_number_workspace_keeps_the_: Lub whole number workspace no khaws kom tus lej ob tsis loj tshaj tus lej ib. Thaum lub hom phiaj kawm yog cov txiaj ntsig negative, siv integer number line.
hmong.reasonableness_check_use_friendly_oper: Reasonableness check: siv cov lej yooj yim xam
hmong.estimation_is_a_safety_check_not_a_rep: Kev kwv yees yog ib qho kev xyuas kom ruaj ntseg, tsis yog los hloov kev xav kom raug.
hmong.correct_your_exact_answer_and_estimate: Yog lawm. Koj cov lus teb tseeb thiab koj qhov kwv yees txhawb ib leeg zuj zus.
hmong.your_exact_answer_is_right_revise_the_: Koj cov lus teb tseeb yog lawm. Kho qhov kwv yees kom poob rau hauv qhov nyob ncig
hmong.not_yet_recheck_each_place_and_compare: Tsis tau. Rov xyuas txhua place value thiab muab piv rau koj qhov kwv yees.
hmong.diagnose_the_reasoning_not_the_learner: Txheeb xyuas txoj kev xav, tsis yog tus tub ntxhais kawm. Cov yuam kev yog cov pov thawj qhia seb tus model twg thiaj pab tau tom ntej.
hmong.choose_the_most_important_error: Xaiv qhov yuam kev tseem ceeb tshaj
hmong.look_again_at_what_happened_to_each_pl: Rov saib seb muaj dab tsi tshwm sim rau txhua place value los sis txhua partial product.
hmong.that_operation_does_not_represent_the_: Qhov operation ntawd tseem tsis tau sawv cev rau qhov kev sib txuas. Nug koj tus kheej seb zaj dab neeg puas tab tom sib sau, faib tawm, rov ua cov pab sib npaug, los sis nrhiav seb muaj pes tsawg pab nyob tau.
hmong.the_whole_number_answer_is_right_re_re: Cov lus teb whole number yog lawm. Rov nyeem seb zaj dab neeg xav kom ua li cas rau qhov seem.
hmong.the_operation_fits_recheck_the_calcula: Qhov operation haum lawm. Rov xyuas kev xam thiab txiav txim seb ntsiab lus siv qhov quotient, qhov remainder, los sis ib pab ntxiv.
hmong.choose_the_operation_from_the_story_th: Xaiv qhov operation ntawm zaj dab neeg, ces txhais qhov tshwm sim raws li ntsiab lus.
hmong.choose_an_operation_for_this_story: Xaiv ib qho operation rau zaj dab neeg no

hmong.n_3_relationship_are_quantities_joined_s: 3. Kev sib txuas: cov npaum puas raug sib sau, faib tawm, rov ua raws pab sib npaug, los sis muab faib raws qhov loj?
hmong.n_5_context_check_decide_what_the_story_: 5. Context check: txiav txim seb zaj dab neeg txhais li cas thaum muaj qhov seem.
hmong.models_the_story_and_the_answer_is: sawv cev rau zaj dab neeg, thiab cov lus teb yog
hmong.build_meaning_first_compare_strategies: Tsim ntsiab lus ua ntej, muab cov strategies sib piv, thiab siv kev kwv yees los xyuas txhua qhov tshwm sim.
hmong.a_correct_answer_matters_but_a_model_e: Cov lus teb raug yog qhov tseem ceeb, tab sis tus model, kev piav qhia, kev kwv yees, thiab kev xyuas nrog inverse operation thiaj ua rau txoj kev xav nyob ruaj.
